title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: Jeff Crume explains digital certificates, their expiration risks for websites and APIs, and why shorter certificate lifetimes increase operational risk. The content frames certificate lifecycle management as an emerging critical discipline in cybersecurity practice.
